name: Francis Kurkdjian
bio: One of the most celebrated perfumers. Creator of Baccarat Rouge 540.

name: Alberto Morillas
bio: Master perfumer behind CK One and Acqua di Gio.

name: Olivier Cresp
bio: Created Angel, Light Blue, and numerous niche successes.

name: Quentin Bisch
bio: Young master at Givaudan. Several Amouage masterpieces.

name: Pierre Montale
bio: Founder and nose of Montale Paris.

name: Jordi Fernandez
bio: Prolific perfumer at Drom Fragrances. Many Arabian fragrances.

name: Nathalie Lorson
bio: Versatile nose at Firmenich.

name: Calice Becker
bio: Creator of J'adore by Dior.

name: Jacques Cavallier
bio: Louis Vuitton's master perfumer.

name: Dominique Ropion
bio: IFF master perfumer. Created Portrait of a Lady.

name: Christopher Sheldrake
bio: In-house perfumer for Serge Lutens.

name: Mathilde Laurent
bio: In-house perfumer for Cartier.

name: Sidonie Lancesseur
bio: Symrise perfumer. Fragrances for Initio.

name: Hamid Merati-Kashani
bio: Givaudan perfumer for Xerjoff and Amouage.

name: Rosendo Mateu
bio: Veteran perfumer who created his own niche line.

name: Jean-Claude Ellena
bio: Former Hermès in-house perfumer.

name: Daniela Andrier
bio: Givaudan perfumer behind Prada Infusion d'Iris.

name: Maurice Roucel
bio: Creator of Musc Ravageur and 24 Faubourg.

name: Annick Menardo
bio: Firmenich perfumer. Created Lolita Lempicka.

name: Richard Herpin
bio: Created Tom Ford Oud Wood and other iconic fragrances.
